instructions.summary: Add benchmark parity for monoio server
instructions.objective: Create Criterion benchmarks and perf binaries for harrow-server-monoio to enable fair comparison with tokio/hyper baseline.
instructions.constraints: - Mirror existing tokio benchmarks - Add io_uring-specific benchmarks (buffer pool, multishot) - Support remote EC2 benchmarking - Capture io_uring metrics (syscalls, CQ/SQ utilization) - Document hardware/kernel requirements

context.tree: harrow-bench/ ├── benches/ │ ├── echo.rs │ ├── full_stack.rs │ └── server_variants.rs ├── src/ │ ├── bin/ │ │ ├── harrow_server.rs │ │ ├── harrow_perf_server.rs │ │ └── harrow_remote_perf_test.rs │ └── lib.rs └── Cargo.toml

guidance.notes:
Files to create:
1. benches/monoio_echo.rs - Mirror echo.rs with monoio runtime 2. benches/monoio_full_stack.rs - Mirror full_stack.rs 3. benches/uring_features.rs - Buffer pool, multishot comparisons 4. src/bin/monoio_server.rs - For external load testing 5. src/bin/monoio_perf_server.rs - Instrumented version
Key considerations: - Monoio requires specific runtime setup (FusionDriver/IouringDriver) - Criterion async benchmarks need monoio runtime block_on - Remote tests need kernel version check (6.1+ for full features) - Document: Docker Desktop incompatible (no io_uring)
